query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_quotations,
  SUM(CASE WHEN totalAmount = 0 OR totalAmount IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_zero_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN totalAmount > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_positive_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'system' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as system_origin,
  SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as manual_origin
FROM quotations;
